历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the lowest science ranking was approximately 13984 → 23365 → 13433 → 13973. After the 2025 new college entrance examination reform, the lowest group (01) ranking for Physics Category was about 24566, significantly shifting backward compared to previous years, mainly due to the influence of major-specific group admissions under the new exam. Science/Physics Category enrollment plans: 93 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 99 in 2024, 99 in 2025; 111 in 2026, an increase of about 12% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure. 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 45th in 2026, stable in the 42–47 range in recent years, belonging to the top agricultural and forestry universities nationwide.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The school's reputation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 54th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure is moderately high, having a positive effect on application attention; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, a total of 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, making related majors highly attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, and the school's related majors (Computer Science, Optoelectronic Information, etc.) benefit from this. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700). Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 229,000 based on historical proportions, leading to sharply intensified competition. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment plan in Yunnan accounts for a small proportion (about 1.1% in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 Physics Category lowest group baseline ranking of 24566, the easing effect of about 12% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province, considering the additional competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers on the basis of supply-demand elasticity, the predicted lowest admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 26552, with a range of 26052–27052.
